productDisplayName: Flying Machine Women This & That Grey Tshirt
description: Composition Grey round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves with fold-over cuffs, sleeves and collar with slight gathers, and collar and hem with snipped edges Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print and embroidery Funky 1980's styling make this tee a hot choice. Wear it with skinnies and sneakers or with a mini skirt and pop-coloured leggings, and style your outfit with bright-coloured chunky plastic jewelery.
